/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -g -std=c++11 -fPIC -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libmymuduo.so -o ../../lib/libmymuduo.so CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/acceptor.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/buffer.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/callbacks.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/channel.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/currentthread.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/defaultpoller.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/epollpoller.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/eventloop.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/eventloopthread.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/eventloopthreadpool.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/inetaddress.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/logger.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/poller.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/socket.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/tcpconnection.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/tcpserver.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/thread.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/timestamp.o
